title: +gname — live demo
description: Gradient @moniker: blend a list of color stops across the letters of your name. HSL with shortest-arc hue. CSS + xterm names and #hex all supported.

steps.note: Pass two or more color names. They blend in HSL across the letters of your name; whitespace passes through uncolored.
Any number of stops is fine. Stops anchor at the endpoints; intermediate stops sit at evenly-spaced positions.
147 CSS named colors are baked in. Try the fancy ones.
Pass any #rrggbb literal — leading # is optional.
No argument shows the current moniker preview.
reset (or clear) drops the moniker; the plain name comes back.
Unknown stops are rejected wholesale — the moniker isn't partially updated.
